debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
k : Fin n
S : List (Call n)
h : isExpert (after n S) k
⊢ n - 1 < S.length

failed_attempts: simpa [after] using isExpert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hle : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have hk : S.length ≤ n - 1 := hle
  have : ¬ isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa using (not_isExpert_of_length_le_sub_one (S := S) (k := k) hk)
  exact this h
simpa using (isExpert_after_length_lt h)

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hlen : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hle
  have hk : (after S) k k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h k
  have hk' : (after S) k k = False := by
    simpa [after, makeCalls, initialState] using hk
  exact hk' rfl
simpa [after] using (isExpert_length_lower_bound (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h)

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hle' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := le_of_not_gt hle
  have hn : S.length + 1 ≤ n := by
    simpa [Nat.succ_le_iff] using (Nat.add_le_add_right hle' 1)
  have hnot : ¬ isExpert (after S) k := by
    exact not_isExpert_of_length_lt_n (S := S) (k := k) hn
  exact hnot h

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hn' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have hk : (after S).knows k ≤ S.length := by
    simpa [after] using (knows_le_length_calls (σ := S) (i := k))
  have hk' : (after S).knows k ≤ n - 1 := le_trans hk hn'
  have hnk : (after S).knows k < n := lt_of_le_of_lt hk' (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
    intro hn0
    have : n = 0 := Nat.eq_of_lt_succ (by simpa [hn0] using (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn0) (by simp)))
    exact hn0 (by simpa using this)) (by simp))
  have : ¬ isExpert (after S) k := by
    intro hexp
    exact (not_isExpert_of_knows_lt_n (i := k) (σ := S) hnk) hexp
  exact this h
simpa [after] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h

have := expert_min_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h
  simpa [Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le] using this
simpa using (isExpert_after_length_lt h)
simpa using (isExpert_callLength_lowerBound (σ := S) h)

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hle' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hle
  have hkcard : (Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).fst) ∪
        Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).snd)).card ≤ 2 * S.length := by
    simpa [two_mul] using
      Finset.card_union_le
        (Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).fst))
        (Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).snd))
  have hcard : n ≤ 2 * S.length + 1 := by
    have : (Finset.univ.erase k).card ≤
        (Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).fst) ∪
          Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).snd)).card := by
      classical
      have : ∀ j : Fin n, j ≠ k → j ∈
          (Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).fst) ∪
            Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin S.length => (S.get i).snd)) := by
        intro j hjk
        have hjk' : (after S) k j := by
          simpa [isExpert] using (h j)
        rcases knows_iff_participates.mp hjk' with ⟨i, hi, hpair⟩
        have hi' : (S.get ⟨i, hi⟩).fst = k ∨ (S.get ⟨i, hi⟩).snd = k := by
          rcases hpair with hpair | hpair <;> simp [hpair]
        have hj' : (S.get ⟨i, hi⟩).fst = j ∨ (S.get ⟨i, hi⟩).snd = j := by
          rcases hpair with hpair | hpair <;> simp [hpair]
        rcases hj' with hj' | hj' <;>
          · rcases hi' with hi' | hi'
            · left; exact Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (by simpa) |>
                (by simpa [hi', hj'])
            · right; exact Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (by simpa) |>
                (by simpa [hi', hj'])
      exact Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn (fun x => x) (by simp) (by simp) (by
        intro a ha b hb hab; simpa using hab)
    simpa using Nat.le_trans (by simpa using this) (Nat.le_trans hkcard (by omega))
  have : n - 1 < S.length := by
    omega
  exact hle this

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hle' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.not_lt.mp hle
  have hk : (after S) k k := by
    simpa using (h k)
  have : False := by
    simpa using hk
  exact this

classical
  by_contra hlen
  have hlen' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := by
    exact Nat.le_of_not_gt hlen
  have hkcard : (after S k).card ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    simpa [after] using state_card_le_length_add_one (S := S) (k := k)
  have : (after S k).card ≤ n := by
    calc
      (after S k).card ≤ S.length + 1 := hkcard
      _ ≤ (n - 1) + 1 := by exact Nat.add_le_add_right hlen' 1
      _ = n := by
        cases n with
        | zero =>
            simp at k
        | succ n =>
            simp
  have hn : n ≤ (after S k).card := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  exact hlen (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_eq (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.add_sub_cancel n 1).symm) (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (le_of_eq rfl)))

classical
  cases n with
  | zero =>
    cases k.elim0
  | succ n =>
    have hk : ∀ a : Fin (Nat.succ n), after S k a := by
      simpa [isExpert] using h
    have hinj : Function.Injective (fun i : Fin (Nat.succ n) => after S.take i.1 k) := by
      intro i j hij
      have hi : after (S.take i.1) k S[i.1] := by
        simpa using (hk S[i.1])
      have hj : after (S.take j.1) k S[j.1] := by
        simpa using (hk S[j.1])
      have : i.1 = j.1 := by
        exact Nat.le_antisymm
          (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.le_of_eq (by rfl))))
          (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.le_of_eq (by rfl))))
      exact Fin.ext this
    have hcard : Nat.succ n ≤ S.length := by
      classical
      have := Finite.card_le_of_injective (α := Fin (Nat.succ n)) (β := Fin S.length) (f := fun i => ⟨i.1, by
        have : i.1 < Nat.succ n := i.2
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.le_of_eq (by rfl))))⟩) (by
          intro i j hij
          exact hinj i j (by
            simp [after, makeCalls, hij]))
      simpa using this
    simpa [Nat.sub_eq, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
      (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self n) hcard)
simpa [after] using isExpert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  by_cases hn : n = 0
  · subst hn
    cases k.elim0
  by_cases hn1 : n = 1
  · subst hn1
    simp at h
    simp
  have hge : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    simpa [Nat.lt_succ_iff] using h
  have : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    exact Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add.mp (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hge)
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn) (by omega)) this
simpa [after] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (k := k) S h

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hle : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have hkn : k.1 < n := k.2
  have hn0 : n ≠ 0 := by
    intro hn0
    simpa [hn0] using hkn
  have : S.length = 0 := by
    have : n - 1 = 0 := Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn0))
    exact Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero (this ▸ hle)
  have hk' : ¬ isExpert (after S) k := by
    simp [after, this, initialState, isExpert]
  exact hk' h

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hlen : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hle
  have hknows : ∀ j : Fin n, after S k j := by
    intro j
    have := h j
    simpa [isExpert] using this
  have hself : after S k k := hknows k
  simpa using hself

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hle : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have hk0 : n = 0 := by
    by_contra hn0
    have hnpos : 0 < n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn0
    have : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
      simpa [Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add_of_le (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hnpos)] using
        (isExpert_calls_lower_bound (S := S) (k := k) h)
    have : n ≤ n := le_trans this (by linarith)
    exact hn0 (Nat.eq_of_le_of_lt_succ (le_trans (le_of_eq rfl) this) (by linarith))
  subst hk0
  cases k.elim0

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hle' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hle
  have hk : (after S) k k := by
    simpa using (h k)
  have hstart : (after []) k k := by
    simp [after]
  have : False := by
    have := (makeCalls_mono (initialState n) (by simpa using List.nil_prefix S)) k k
    exact (not_lt_of_ge (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hle')) (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
  exact this
simpa using (expert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h)

classical
  by_cases hn : n = 0
  · subst hn
    cases k.elim0
  by_cases hn1 : n = 1
  · subst hn1
    simp at h
  have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := by
    have : n ≠ 0 := hn
    have : n ≠ 1 := hn1
    omega
  have hk : v S k = n - 1 := by
    simpa [isExpert, after] using h
  have hvle : v S k ≤ S.length := by
    simpa [v] using List.countP_le_length (p := fun c : Call n => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S
  have hlen : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    simpa [hk] using hvle
  have hpos : 0 < n - 1 := by
    have : 1 < n := by omega
    exact Nat.sub_pos_of_lt this
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hpos hlen
simpa using (expert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h)

classical
  rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos n with rfl | hn
  · simpa using (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.zero_lt _))
  have hk : (k : Nat) < n := k.isLt
  have hn' : 0 < n := hn
  have hk' : 0 < n := hn
  have : (Nat.card {a : Fin n | a ≠ k}) ≤ S.length := by
    have hsub :
        {a : Fin n | a ≠ k} ⊆ {a : Fin n | (after S) k a} := by
      intro a ha
      have : a ≠ k := ha
      have hek : isExpert (after S) k := h
      simpa [isExpert, this] using hek a
    have hinj : InjOn (fun a : Fin n => Classical.choose (h (a))) {a : Fin n | a ≠ k} := by
      intro a ha b hb hab
      exact by
        classical
        by_contra hne
        have ha' : a ≠ k := ha
        have hb' : b ≠ k := hb
        have hka : (after S) k a := by simpa [isExpert, ha'] using h a
        have hkb : (after S) k b := by simpa [isExpert, hb'] using h b
        have := congrArg (fun i => (Classical.choose_spec (h a)).1) hab
        simp at this
    have hle :
        Nat.card {a : Fin n | a ≠ k} ≤ Nat.card {i : Fin S.length | True} := by
      simpa using Nat.card_le_of_injective (fun a => (⟨0, by simp⟩ : Fin S.length)) (by
        intro a b hab; simpa using hab)
    simpa using (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.le_of_eq rfl)))
  have hcard : Nat.card {a : Fin n | a ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    classical
    simpa using Fintype.card_subtype_neq (a := k)
  have : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by simpa [hcard] using this
  exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne this (by
    intro hEq
    have : n - 1 = S.length := hEq.symm
    exact Nat.ne_of_lt (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_gt hn) (by decide)) this)

classical
  rcases Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero (n := n) (by
    intro hn
    subst hn
    exact Fin.elim0 k) with ⟨n', rfl⟩
  simpa using (isExpert_length_lower_bound (S := S) (k := k) h)

classical
  by_cases hn : n = 0
  · subst hn
    cases k.elim0
  by_cases hn1 : n = 1
  · subst hn1
    simpa using Nat.zero_lt_iff.2 (by
      have : False := by
        simpa [isExpert, after] using h
      contradiction)
  have hk : (n - 1) ≤ S.length := by
    have : (Fintype.card (Fin n) - 1) ≤ S.length := by
      simpa using (isExpert.length_ge_card_sub_one (S := S) (k := k) h)
    simpa using this
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn) (by
    have : 1 < n := Nat.one_lt_iff_ne_zero_and_ne_one.2 ⟨hn, hn1⟩
    exact Nat.pos_of_gt this)) hk
simpa using (isExpert_callLength_lowerBound (S := S) (k := k) h)

simpa [Nat.lt_sub_iff_add_lt, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
    (expert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h)
simpa [after] using isExpert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h
simpa using (expert_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) h)
